payload.answer: This appears to be additive: the new preference can be kept in addition to the existing one without replacing it.
repair_options: add_new: Add Sonny Rollins as an additional liked artist for Sam from Goldman, keeping the existing Bill Evans preference.
keep_existing: Keep only the existing memory that Sam from Goldman likes Bill Evans, and do not add the new Sonny Rollins preference.
edit: Revise the preference statement manually, for example to say Sam from Goldman likes Bill Evans and Sonny Rollins.
cancel: Do not make any changes.
